lines: Words are scratched into the column under the old whitewash, in a shaking hand, by someone who did not want to be heard confessing it.
"I let the road wardens seal the east farms. I heard the children inside. I prayed louder so I would not hear them. God forgive the loud."
Below, in a steadier hand that is not the same person: "Forgiven. Also lesson three. Guilt opens the fastest."
